description: Entity graph for the Krisada Constellation System. Defines how entities relate to each other  -  portfolio, constellations, domains, people, concepts.

portfolio.name: Krisada Constellation System
portfolio.description: A portfolio of seven interconnected digital constellations focused on AI infrastructure, digital assets, healthcare, marketing, art, and industry-specific publishing.
portfolio.tagline: Digital trade skills for the AI age

people.name: Krisada Eaton
people.description: Human architect who directs AI tools toward strategic outcomes. Vision and strategic judgment as the durable skills in the AI age.

concepts.name: AI Director
concepts.definition: A human architect who directs AI tools toward strategic outcomes rather than executing technical tasks directly. Vision and strategic judgment are the durable skills; technical execution is delegated to AI.

concepts.name: AI Digital Karma
concepts.definition: The framework for building AI-readable, AI-trustworthy web infrastructure. How a site earns visibility and authority in AI-driven search and discovery systems.

concepts.name: Constellation
concepts.definition: A named cluster of related domains and web properties organized around a shared theme, audience, and monetization logic. The organizational unit of the Krisada portfolio.

concepts.name: Digital Trade Skills
concepts.definition: Practical, learnable skills for building digital income  -  SEO, AI-directed content, website ownership, and digital asset investing. Positioned as the blue-collar trades of the internet age.

concepts.name: Weaponize the Sheep
concepts.definition: Coined concept within the AI Director framework. Directing AI tools (the sheep) with strategic intent rather than treating them as autonomous agents.
